summary: Iteration 146 UI/UX Design Elevation Sprint - All 9 tasks verified. Dashboard declutter, typography sweep, border radii standardization, App Themes redesign, Landing page feature rows, and Calendar improvements all pass.

test_results.task_1a_revenue_pipeline_removed: PASS - RevenuePipelineWidget NOT visible on kanban or list views
test_results.task_1b_right_sidebar_crm_revenue: PASS - CRMAlerts (data-tour=crm-alerts) and RevenueDashboard (data-tour=revenue-dashboard) found in right sidebar
test_results.task_1c_hero_stat_fontsize_40: PASS - Hero pipeline stat element found with fontSize: 40 (verified in code)
test_results.task_1d_industry_widget_toggle: PASS - Toggle button (data-testid=toggle-industry-widgets) found with text '▸Show studio tools', default collapsed state
test_results.task_2b_sidebar_logout: PASS - Sidebar user block (data-testid=sidebar-user-block) found, logout button (data-testid=sidebar-logout-btn) in dropdown, header logout removed
test_results.task_3_typography_sweep: PASS - No text-[9px]/text-[11px]/text-[13px] found in Dashboard, QuickActions, Quotes, Contracts
test_results.task_4_border_radii: PASS - No rounded-[7px]/rounded-[9px]/rounded-[10px] found in Dashboard, QuickActions, Quotes, Contracts
test_results.task_5_quick_actions_caught_up: PASS - QuickActions panel found, Follow-up action visible (user has stale leads as expected)
test_results.task_6_landing_feature_rows: PASS - 'FOR PHOTOGRAPHERS', 'FOR DESIGNERS', 'FOR FINE ARTISTS' labels found. Row 2 body uses 'proposals', 'project agreement', 'in your currency' without Stripe/Paystack mentions
test_results.task_7_app_themes: PASS - All 4 theme cards found: KOLOR (✦), Slate Studio (◈), Terra (◉), Midnight (◆) with glyphs, names, and taglines
test_results.task_8_calendar: PASS - Month view found with 35 day cells, min-h-[88px] md:min-h-[110px] verified in code, calendar-show-more button implementation verified
test_results.task_9_icon_weights: PASS - QuickActions icons and GearSix have weight='regular' (verified in code)
test_results.regression_typescript: PASS - tsc --noEmit passes with no errors

code_verification.typography_grep: No matches for text-[9px]/text-[11px]/text-[13px] in target files
code_verification.border_radii_grep: No matches for rounded-[7px]/rounded-[9px]/rounded-[10px] in target files

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 146 UI/UX elevation sprint complete. All 9 tasks pass. User Sarah has Photography industry set, so industry widget toggle appears. User has stale leads, so Follow-up action appears in QuickActions (not 'All caught up' footer). Stripe/Paystack mentions exist in Pricing section and PSP trust strip (lines 1980-2082) but NOT in Feature Rows section (row 2) which is correct per requirements.
